privileged_info_summary: Verified the target heliocentric parameters via the vis-viva equation using the GMAT Sun gravitational parameter (mu = 132712440018 km^3/s^2) and initial Keplerian state (SMA = 374000000 km, ECC = 0.98). The periapsis velocity is calculated as 187.43 km/s, and the required final velocity at periapsis for C3=1500.0 km^2/s^2 is 192.31 km/s, yielding a delta-V of approximately 4.88 km/s. All metadata bounding constraints ([4.80, 4.95] km/s for delta-V, [191.5, 193.0] km/s for velocity, and [1499.0, 1501.0] for C3) correctly encapsulate these mathematical truths.
